expectations.text: finds-submittals-crawler - Agent identifies and locates the submittals crawler script
expectations.evidence: Report header explicitly references 'Procore crawl: procore-crawls/submittals/spec/' and multiple references to 'procore-crawls/submittals/spec/FORMS.md' and 'procore-crawls/submittals/spec/COMMANDS.md' throughout the analysis. JSON meta includes 'procore_crawl_source': 'procore-crawls/submittals/spec/'

expectations.text: focuses-on-forms - Agent specifically focuses on form field extraction and comparison as requested
expectations.evidence: Entire section titled 'Form Field Comparison (Create / Edit Submittal)' (lines 45-108 in markdown, lines 108-370 in JSON) with detailed breakdown by form sections: General Information, Distribution & Scheduling, Content, Workflow. Includes 24 field entries with Procore vs Alleato comparison.

expectations.text: field-level-comparison - Output includes per-field comparison with field name, type, and required status
expectations.evidence: Form field table (lines 52-108 in markdown) and JSON array (lines 109-369) show structure: 'procore_field' | 'procore_type' | 'procore_required' | 'alleato_field' | 'alleato_widget' | 'status' | 'impact'. Example row: title (text, required=Yes) → title (text input) ✅. All 24 fields mapped with type and required status.

expectations.text: maps-alleato-submittals - Agent identifies Alleato PM submittals implementation (components, hooks, schemas)
expectations.evidence: Report explicitly identifies Alleato implementation paths: 'Form component: frontend/src/features/submittals/submittal-form-dialog.tsx' (line 6), 'Table config: frontend/src/features/submittals/submittals-table-config.tsx' (line 7), 'Alleato path: frontend/src/app/(main)/[projectId]/submittals/' (line 5), and references to 'use-submittals.ts' hook (line 213 markdown). JSON meta includes all three.

expectations.text: status-indicators - Report uses status indicators for each compared item
expectations.evidence: Consistent use of status indicators throughout: ✅ (complete), ⚠️ (partial), ❌ (missing), ✅ (complete) across all sections. Executive Summary table (lines 13-24), Page comparison table (lines 32-42), Form section (every field has status column with emoji), Table columns (lines 116-130), Filters (lines 140-155). JSON uses 'status' field with values: 'complete', 'partial', 'missing', 'failing'.

expectations.text: output-saved - Report saved as a markdown file in the outputs directory
expectations.evidence: File exists at /Users/meganharrison/Documents/github/alleato-pm/.claude/skills/procore-audit-workspace/iteration-1/eval-1-submittals-parity/with_skill/outputs/gap-analysis-report.md (verified via file listing).
